title: AI agent for real due diligence (not trade calls). What’s your go-to “research accelerator” app when you’re out of the office?
author: SamLeCoyote_Fix_1
selftext:
Curious how people are dealing with this stuff as it changes so fast. I mean tools that help with the boring deep work (filings, transcripts, expert calls, pulling numbers, writing a memo) but don’t give trade calls.

You’ve got the big names and a bunch of new ones trying to get in. What actually ends up in your day‑to‑day workflow, especially when you’re not at your desk?

If you’ve used or tested any of these, would be great to get a few honest comments: AlphaSense (incl. Tegus), Hudson Labs Co‑Analyst, Daloopa, o11ai, Captide, Marketbone-Pro or anything else you think is slept on.
